zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Theobald於1510年出生在英國肯特澤亞爾時，他的父親Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley39歲，母親Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley35歲。他和Lady, Ann Elisy至少有3個女兒。他去世於1550年7月1日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Theobald于1510年出生在英国肯特澤亞爾时，他的父亲Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley39岁，母亲Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley35岁。他和Lady, Ann Elisy至少有3个女儿。他去世于1550年7月1日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and English: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements theud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The English surname represents a learned form, re-created from French Théobald. The usual medieval forms of the name in English and German were Tebald and Tibalt (Old French Teobaud, Tibaut). Compare Dewald and Diebold .

variants.name: Dewald
meanings: German: from the personal name Diebold, from Middle High German Dietbold, from Old High German diot ‘people, nation’ + bald ‘brave, strong’. As an American surname this is also an altered form of the cognate Theobald . Compare Davolt , Dawalt , Daywalt , Devault 3, and Dewalt 1.

History: One of the first Dewalds in North America was Johannes Michael Dewald from Medard, a village in the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived at Philadelphia, PA, in 1738 on the ship Glasgow. He married Maria Barbara Schmidt and settled in Berks County, PA. His father's surname was Theobald. Michael's descendants also bear some other altered forms of the surname, including Dewalt, Dawalt, and Davolt. — One of the earliest immigrants who bore the original German surname Dewald was Henry alias He(i)nrich Dewald from the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived in PA in 1766. His descendants mainly bear altered forms of the surname, especially Devault .

variants.name: Tidball
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): variant of   Theobald  .

variants.name: Tebbs
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of Tebb, which is usually from a pet form of the Middle English male personal name Tebbold (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Tipple
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the medieval personal name Tebald, Tibalt (see Theobald ).
German: nickname for a simple person, from Low German tippel ‘point, corner’ (a reference to the pointed shape of a fool's cap).
German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name, a pet form of   Dietrich  .

variants.name: Tibbs
meanings: English: variant of Tibb, from the Middle English personal name Tibbe, which was used in the 13th century as both male (from Tibald, see Theobald ) and female name (a shortened form of Tibot, a pet form of Isabel, see Tebbutt ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Theobald was born in 1510, in Seal, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley, was 39 and his mother, Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley, was 35. He had at least 3 daughters with Lady, Ann Elisy. He died on 1 July 1550, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Theobald est né en 1510, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Lady, Ann Elisy. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1550, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Theobald 1510 in Seal, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley 39 und seine Mutter Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley 35. Er hatte mit Lady, Ann Elisy mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juli 1550 im Alter von 40 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Theobald è nato il nel 1510 nel Seal, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Lady, Ann Elisy. Morì il 1 luglio 1550, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Theobaldが1510年にイギリスケントセアルで生まれた時，父Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepleyは39歳，母Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepleyは35歳であった。彼はLady, Ann Elisyとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1550年7月1日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Theobald(이)가 1510년 영국 켄트 시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Lady, Ann Elisy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 7월 1일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Theobald nasceu em 1510, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Lady, Ann Elisy. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1550, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Theobald родился в 1510 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Lady, Ann Elisy. Он умер 1 июля 1550 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Theobald nació en 1510, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Theobald V, Baron of Shepley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Sarah Silvestra Carter , Baroness of Shepley, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Lady, Ann Elisy. Murió el 1 de julio de 1550, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
